text: @openclaw please implement backend Issue 1 (migrations), Issue 2 (models & scopes), and Issue 3 (auth). Keep it clean, no emojis.
Task acknowledged. Starting database setup and models initialization.
@openclaw please implement backend Issue 4 (database seeder) and Issue 5 (PHPUnit tests). Ensure tenant isolation is covered.
Seeder and test cases have been completed. All database schemas are successfully populated and verified.
@openclaw please implement frontend Issue 6 (Vite setup & Axios client) and Issue 7 (Auth pages). Ensure routing works.
Acknowledged. Bootstrapping React app and setting up login views.
@openclaw please implement frontend Issue 8 (Dashboard metrics), Issue 9 (Sidebar), and Issue 10 (Ticket list and details).
Ticket list filters, dashboard metrics cards, comments and claiming flows have been implemented successfully.
